site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page for real estate agents who need instant lead response, reliable follow-ups, listing updates, and showing scheduling — powered by a personal AI agent that can actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated workflows.
